Prudent Pragmatists.quote: My pet is part of my family, looking after them can be a hassle sometimes
Prudent Pragmatists.description: A practical pet owner that loves their pet but is trying to balance this with financial constraints and the occasional inconvenience of having a pet. As a budget conscious pet owner, they stick to spending only on the essentials, going to vets only when necessary and sticking to standard pet food and products.

Security Seekers.description: A pet owner that sees their pet as a dependable friend, who protects them and acts as status symbol. Money is no object when it comes to making sure their pet is healthy – seeking regular vet and dental visits, investing in specialised pet food and supplements.

Comfort Companions.quote: My pet is my companion– a faithful friend and comforting presence at home
Comfort Companions.description: A pet owner that sees their pet as a true companion to help them ward off loneliness. Their pet is a beloved family member, who has free reign of their home. However, they have a relaxed attitude towards pet care – spending moderately on pet products, not socializing or taking their pet out and about with them.

Adventure Seekers.quote: My pet is my adventure buddy, we explore the world together
Adventure Seekers.description: An adventurous pet owner, who likes to take the unbeaten track. Their pet is more than a companion – a co-adventurer that shares in their excitement of seeing new places. They enjoy spending a lot of quality time with their pets beyond just physical exercise.

Ambitious Go-Getters.quote: My pet is my wingman, they must look good so I look good
Ambitious Go-Getters.description: Highly ambitious and status driven owners have pets that are not just their companion but a symbol of their success. Pets reflect their external image to the world, as such this pet owner doesn’t hesitate to splurge on their pets; on pet clothes, grooming, nutritional counselling etc.

Well-being Warriors.quote: My pet keeps me healthy — their wellbeing is as important as mine
Well-being Warriors.description: This pet owner has a holistic understanding of health, both for themselves and their pet — with wellbeing a key driver for them. This segment prioritizes their pets' physical, mental and emotional well-being, spending on health-specific needs like regular vet visits and specialized supplements and vitamins for their pets.

Passionate Parents.quote: My pet is my baby, I would give up anything to make them happy
Passionate Parents.description: A passionate pet parent who treats their pet like their child. A crucial part of what brings meaning to their life, they prioritise their pets’ happiness; celebrating their pets’ ‘gotcha day’, giving them the best and indulging them in chews/treats and toys.
